clusters.name: agentic_llm_for_rm
clusters.description: Agentic AI or LLM-driven systems explicitly solving resource management decisions (scheduling, placement, scaling, allocation) in cloud-edge.
example_titles: Agent-as-a-Service: An AI-Native Edge Computing Framework for 6G Networks
Can LLMs only talk? Experimental studies on task scheduling with Large Language Models
An Agentic Task Offloading Workflow Method for Intellicise Wireless Networks

clusters.name: classical_rl_marl_without_llm
clusters.description: Reinforcement learning or multi-agent systems for RM without agentic LLM component (pre-transformer era or RL/MARL-only).
example_titles: Adaptive AI-based Decentralized Resource Management in the Cloud-Edge Continuum
Collaborative computation offloading in satellite–terrestrial networks enabled by satellite edge computing
Energy-Efficient UAV-Driven Multi-Access Edge Computing: A Distributed Many-Agent Perspective

clusters.name: llm_as_workload
clusters.description: Systems managing LLM or generative AI workloads/inference, not deploying LLM agents for RM decisions (Boundary B violation).
example_titles: Serverless RAG-Stream: A Cloud Pipeline for Efficient Real-Time Retrieval-Augmented Generation
Distributed VLMs: Efficient Vision-Language Processing through Cloud-Edge Collaboration
FlexGen: Efficient On-Demand Generative AI Service With Flexible Diffusion Model in Mobile Edge Networks

clusters.name: security_governance_not_rm
clusters.description: LLM-driven security, compliance, policy automation, audit — not resource allocation/scheduling decisions (Boundary B).
example_titles: KubeScribe: LLM-Driven Automation of Runtime Security Policies in Cloud-Native Environments
Cross-Cloud Data Privacy Protection: Optimizing Collaborative Mechanisms
Analyzing and mitigating (with LLMs) the security misconfigurations of Helm charts

clusters.name: non_rm_non_infrastructure_scope
clusters.description: Works outside resource management domain or infrastructure scope (analytics, monitoring, optimization in non-cloud contexts, healthcare, business systems).
example_titles: LLMs for Resource Allocation in Next-Gen RIS-Aided Healthcare Wireless Networks
Can pre-trained LLMs be used as out-of-the-box bottleneck detectors? An explorative study
Optimisation and application of management accounting system based on generative artificial intelligence

clusters.name: survey_review_editorial
clusters.description: Survey papers, systematic reviews, literature surveys, or editorials (excluded by document-type gate).
example_titles: Toward Edge General Intelligence With Multiple-Large Language Model (MLLM)
Enhancing Adaptability, Security, and Resource Optimization by Convergence of Clouds

clusters.name: agent_without_llm_signal
clusters.description: Agent-based or multi-agent systems for RM with no clear LLM component in abstract (likely classical MAS or MARL).
example_titles: Dynamic Load Balancing with Agent-Based Algorithm in Cloud Computing via OpenStack
Decentralized Multi-Agent Task Offloading in LEO Satellite Edge Computing
Intent-Driven Multi-Agent Coordination for Edge Computing under Resource Constraints

clusters.name: no_pdf_or_insufficient_evidence
clusters.description: Papers without accessible PDF or insufficient evidence to judge scope/relevance (exclude at gate).
example_titles: INT-LLM: Adaptive Path Planner for In-Band Network Telemetry via Large Language Models
